This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_throws_dom: "::picker(select):popover-open" should throw in querySelector function "() => document.querySelector(selector)" did not throw
[FAIL] "select::picker(select):popover-open" should be an invalid selector
  assert_throws_dom: "select::picker(select):popover-open" should throw in querySelector function "() => document.querySelector(selector)" did not throw
